reviews.review_title: A race car game without a steering wheel
reviews.review_description:
I really like this game because you are racing a car (aircraft vehicle) but you do not need to attempt to hang onto an imaginary steering wheel.  (The wheel idea never works and the mechanics really suck)  

In this game, you are using the controller and your arm to steer the vehicle down long, winding paths that have obstacles, walls, and other drivers to avoid hitting as you race.  Solo competitions as well as tournaments to join in on.  I got the demo for free and played and as soon as the finished version was available, I bought it!  It is very similar to POD racing in Star Wars.  The better you get, the better the competition gets.  So many different tracks, car upgrades, and difficulty levels to play. 

Very fun and very challenging.

At the age of 72 and  my first time playing a video game in V R , Z Race for a first time is a outstanding experience for someone who as never played in VR. l normal play retro video games, and l have only had my Oculus quest 2 for a few days, and lam hooked ,what a experience  ( Thank you Meta quest) .

I got gold in every track. Love this game. I can feel my heart beating faster, breath getting short. (Btw, you can turn off the sound where they tell you to stop bumping into the walls, which is great because that definitely gets annoying.)

Interesting take on a racing game, the sound bite about hitting the wall was funny the first time but quickly gets really annoying - especially if you are learning to play it.
Seem to only be able to play 'asynchronous multiplayer' no single race, career or time trial and when I did race I came 6th and said I was first which was odd.
Every time I touch the wall or the black jagged things, I hear the same three lines over and over. Beyond annoying.

I loved Wipeout back in the day. This game gives me the same rush and improves it. The controls are awesome and easy to get used to. This game is really fun and I love it.

I hope the devs fix the loading speeds. Also it would be great if you could select the next track when you finish the track. Now you can only repeat the same track.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your kind feedback, I'll inform devs about your wishes!

reviews.review_description: A fantastic take on the racing genre, also a nice treat to her all my YouTube friends

reviews.review_title: Best game I've ever played in VR
reviews.review_description:
After playing for about 15 hours and getting number #1 in the leaderboards on every track I am posting this review. 

Z-Race is phenomenonal. It's creative, fast paced, and competitive all at the same time. I have been playing time trial racing games at high levels for over 10 years and this is the first one in VR that really earned my respect from a competitive viewpoint. 

In the game, you control a ship with your hand/arm and navigate around the tracks while racing the "ghosts" of other players that have a time that is similar to yours. As you improve your time, you get new ghosts of players further up the leaderboard, which drives you to improve further and adds so much replayability. 

The skill ceiling in the game is high, you have to learn the tracks carefully to grab boosts and use them at the best times to save the most time, there is also a slow motion technique to help you grab boosts that are in awkward areas. 

I will be playing this more and optimising my times further. I honestly cannot say how happy I am with this game because I've been looking for a competitive racer in VR for a long time. 

Suggestions from me - 

A replay mode so I can watch my ghost or even others ghosts.

A way to restart my runs without having to finish the run (there doesn't seem to be a pause menu?)

A way that I can race against my own ghosts.

A mode with no obstacles. That would be very cool and optimized from a competitive perspective. 

Great game. Thanks again. I look forward to more projects from you in future. Good luck getting Z-Race onto the official store, it deserves it!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for such a sincere review! Our whole team read it and were delighted! We will continue to do our best:)

reviews.review_description: If you tired with ports of classic arcade game, try this one, it has own way to control which is really easy to get in, however, i doubt you can get first placeses everywhere. Race with nearest players in chart by ghosts.

This game is amazing and well done, it's challenging and the way to play is great.
It is so fast, love music. I love it and i Always want to beat my score

So happy i went through buying the full version of this game cant wait to see what they have in store in the future! Updated im happy to say the progression from tournament to tournament has been unpredictable in a good way hidden boost behind walls and objects add for and intense battle against the clock! Learning that there is a discord today has peaked my further interest to join and try and make more friends. Xocus keep up the great work and if ever interested in track ideas feel free to ask!

reviews.review_title: Amazing racing game with cool mechanism
reviews.review_description:
This game is Amazing racing game where you fly to beat your opponents and try win their time and get to first place!

You have different types of  flying cars and full hand movement of your car! 

Also there is tons of tracks to choose from and to unlock

Really recommend this game and you won't be disappointed at all!

reviews.review_title: It's a fun game I'll give it that
reviews.review_description:
I had the demo when it came out and got the paid version when it was released , ill give yall 3 stars , although fun to play good music , graphix , game Mechanix are all good , only thing I don't like is there really isn't any point in u o b races if when u do upgrade evry other racer ur against is going at the same speed as you , all ships travel at what ever upgrades ur on the only Real advantage is drive better , 
If at the start I drop all the upgrades on my ship I should be the fastest ship would be able to crash once or twice and still win , but I hit nitro out the gate and everybody did also and going at roughly the same speed , ull leave behind the ones who crash , even cutting the track to its tightest turns.  I don't see this taking over vr,  I mean racket no has more competition than this
First game I played that system was uphill racing and I got to tell u its really a.i cheating us the a.i will let u win a race or 2 after u upgrade then it trashes u but by only seconds 😁 to encourage the player to spend more money to buy upgrades , but I didn't see any in game store to buy add ons with cash so ur using it just to have full races evrytime we want to play? 🤔  nope I'd rather play real player real time and not let an a.i determine who should race against me by the last time I pulled on the race or the previous race,  cause I can't call that real racing , that's a.i completely dictating the game , there is no real competition against other players cause I smash everybody in the race and what glory is there ? They don't even know I raced them hell they didn't even know they wher racing me, so ur a.i is using my previous races to race other people right. /thats how that works right ,  sorry but loose 2 more stars now I just don't like ur game I wish could get a refund , but ur game is about to get deleted now  , I truly don't like that, I say that total bs on ur parts ,
P.s synchronous multi-player is possible with today's vr technology,  beatsaber does it , space pirates , shackpavlove,aim vr, a bunch of vr games are real time multiplayers today, no need to use asynchronous racing,          ((((((" so in reality why are u using it?")))))

developer_response.body: We also offer synchronous multiplayer. You can play Z-Race with your friends from MetaQuest. The alternative solution is ready. We would be glad if you change your rating.

reviews.review_description: The game is fun but the settings are just not their. It’s small and not very helpful. I wanted to see if I can change my camera angle to first person or at least change it to look like I’m in the car unlike just holding a car. It is fun but not a lot of customization not optimization. The loading screen to leave takes so long it’s quicker to quit the game. The intro themes are also very buggy and glitchy. So little customization that you can’t even turn off the narrator. It has potential.

reviews.review_title: The best race in the Oculus Store.
reviews.review_description:
As I wrote under the demo version of the game: the control of a flying car in the game, was invented by a genius. It's very exciting, there's so much adrenaline that splashes out of my skull.
As intuitive as possible, as convenient as possible, as fast as possible.

Z-Race resembles "Vipe Out" combined with a series of multiplayer races, with F1 cars on tracks with dead loops, etc. - "TrackMania"

It was very exciting, I'm really enjoying this game, I downloaded demo and then bought full version because it definitely deserves this 
I see developers know what they’re doing, really fun and quite addictive game that doesn't include motion sickness (it was surprise because it's hard for me to play other vr games)
So, I'm loving this game - it looks great and unique control scheme works super well !
